debug_info.goal:

⊢ longestIncreasingSubseqLength_postcond xs (longestIncreasingSubseqLength xs h_precond) h_precond

induction xs <;> simp_all [List.sublists, List.sublists', List.Pairwise, List.length]
  <;> aesop

apply And.intro
  · apply List.contains_of_mem
    apply List.le_max_of_mem
    exact List.mem_filter.mpr ⟨by rfl, by rfl⟩
  · intro l hl
    apply Nat.le_of_not_gt
    intro h
    have := List.max_of_mem (by rfl) (List.mem_filter.mp hl).2
    linarith

induction xs <;> simp_all [List.sublists, List.sublists', List.Pairwise, List.length]
  <;> aesop

have : ∀ l : List Int, isStrictlyIncreasing l = true ↔ List.Pairwise (· < ·) l := by
    intro l
    induction l <;> simp [isStrictlyIncreasing, List.Pairwise]
    <;> split_ifs <;> simp_all [List.Pairwise]
  simp_all
  <;> apply Eq.symm
  <;> apply Eq.symm
  <;> rfl

induction xs <;> simp_all [List.Pairwise, List.foldl, List.filter, List.map, List.length]
  <;> aesop

induction xs with
  | nil => simp
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp_all [List.sublists, List.sublists'_eq_sublists]
    <;> aesop

have : ∀ l : List Int, isStrictlyIncreasing l = true ↔ List.Pairwise (· < ·) l := by
    intro l
    induction l with
    | nil => simp [isStrictlyIncreasing, List.Pairwise]
    | cons x xs ih =>
      cases xs with
      | nil => simp [isStrictlyIncreasing, List.Pairwise]
      | cons y ys =>
        simp [isStrictlyIncreasing, List.Pairwise, ih]
        split <;> simp_all
  simp_all
  <;> apply List.foldl_max_of_mem
  <;> aesop

induction xs with
  | nil => simp
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp_all [List.sublists, List.sublists', List.Pairwise, List.length]
    <;> aesop

sorry
  · -- Show all lengths are ≤ result
    sorry
